translated_texts: Who are you? Who on earth did this kind of thing...
He wouldn't really put money in, so...
If Seong Nak-Suk is doing this, wouldn」t it be… better to use this name?

He probably didn't really put money in...
To be honest, it seems unlikely that Seong Nak-suk would do this… but should we do it under this name anyway?

There is no way he actually put money in...
